title: Pathology lab and Diagnostic Centre for Blood test in India - Metropolis Healthcare
heading: Good health starts with regular health tests
description: Metropolis Healthcare, a leading diagnostic chain with international presence, offers science-backed pathology reports. Book blood tests or health packages online with home service for quality results.

Metropolis has been present for over 40 years in the market. Metropolis has a team of 200 senior pathologists and over 2000 technicians delivering diagnostic
                  solutions in the areas of routine, semi specialty and super specialty domains like Oncology,
                  Neurology, Gynaecology, Nephrology and many more. We offer a comprehensive range of 4000+ clinical laboratory tests and profiles, which are used
                  for
                  prediction, early detection, diagnostic screening, confirmation and/or monitoring of the
                  disease. 170+ Advanced Labs Trusted by Leading Doctors & Hospitals Over 2000+ Scientific Officers Proficiency Testing for Accurate Reports Latest Blogs & News View More June 12, 2026 Heel Pain: Causes, Diagnosis, And Treatment Options June 12, 2026 Foot Pain: Causes, Diagnosis, And Treatments You Need To Know June 12, 2026 Pale Stool: What It Means And When To See A Doctor June 12, 2026 Belchin
